steps.title: Seeing Through
steps.text: An X-ray attack is when a piece attacks THROUGH an intervening piece — often the enemy's own piece. If the intervening piece moves, your attack lands behind it. Unlike a pin, X-ray usually wins or gains tempo either way.

steps.title: Example
steps.text: Here White's d1 rook X-rays the enemy king through the d2 and d8 rooks. After exchanges on d8, the king is pinned or the back-rank collapses.
